prompt: I need a signup form with email, password, and a terms checkbox. Email should validate on blur, password needs to be at least 8 chars with onChange validation (debounced), and the form should show server-side errors too. Use @base-ui/react.
assertions: uses-field-root: Uses Field.Root for each form control
uses-form-component: Uses Form component with errors/onClearErrors for server errors
uses-checkbox: Terms checkbox uses Checkbox.Root + Checkbox.Indicator
no-asChild: Does NOT use asChild (Radix pattern)
